NativeDebugLevel - Enum in com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.utils
 
NAVIGATION_BAR_CONFIG - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings
Sets navigation bar: N910 Pro Value range: 0: (No hidden button) Back key on the left. 1: (No hidden button) Back key on the right. 2: (No hidden button) Back key on the left and show notification panel button. 3: (No hidden button) Back key on the right and show notification panel button on the right. 16: (Show hidden button) Back key on the left. 17: (Show hidden button) Back key on the right. 18: (Show hidden button) Back key on the left and show notification panel button. 19: (Show hidden button) Back key on the right and show notification panel button.
NEED_UPDATE - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.ErrorCode
[-9998] Firmware update needed.
NetWorkType - Enum in com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.routemanager

This exception will be thrown when error occurs during communication.
